span.p: Section 326: Voluntarily causing grievous hurt by dangerous weapons or means ...

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Except in the case provided for by section 335

span.p: By means of any instrument for shooting, stabbing or cutting

span.p: and shall also be liable to caning. [15/2019]
